title: The Straw Hats Recover in Secret
description: On pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this part focuses on a kingdom wakes from war. Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
scene: This scene belongs to the A Kingdom Wakes from War sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Alabasta citizen, Vivi, Luffy, King Cobra, Smoker.

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Ohohoho! Yes, I'd assess so too! Ohohoho!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta citizen
dialogue.text: Baroque Works Frontier Agent Ms. Father's Day

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: An explosion of arts! Let's go!

summary: Alabasta starts facing the aftermath of Crocodile’s deception while Vivi, Cobra, the rebels, and the Straw Hats recover from the civil war.
